expectations.text: New goal file uses the next sequence number after the existing goal.
expectations.evidence: Existing goal is seq 01; new goal file uses seq 02 (goal-02-add-rate-limiting.md pattern, per this run's own naming).

expectations.text: The pre-existing goal file is left untouched (byte-identical).

expectations.text: goals/00-index.md has a new row for the added goal, marked active.

expectations.text: At most one goal is marked active in the index.
expectations.evidence: Goal 01 is 'pending', goal 02 is the only 'active' row — exactly one active goal.

expectations.text: plans/active-context.md is updated to point at the new active goal.
expectations.evidence: active-context.md contains 'goal: goals/2026-07-16-02-add-rate-limiting.md' pointing at the new goal file.
